category_sources: Official repository README describes Precious as a code quality tool for running linters and tidiers.
source_facts.description says Precious is one code quality tool to rule them all.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the display name Precious.
source_facts.name supplies the package name precious.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official README describes running linters and tidiers from one configuration and command.
source_facts.description identifies a code quality tool.
